# RIOD — EV Charging & Energy Technology

> RIOD designs, develops, and manufactures EV charging infrastructure and energy management technology. Every layer — hardware, firmware, cloud platforms, and energy systems — is built in-house.

## Company

- **Brand**: RIOD
- **Parent Company**: RnD Square Pvt. Ltd.
- **Founded**: 2019
- **Headquarters**: Infopark Koratty, Kerala 680308, India
- **Website**: https://riod.energy
- **Store**: https://shop.riod.in
- **Contact**: hello@riod.in
- **Industry**: EV Charging Infrastructure, Energy Management, IoT

## Products

### AC EV Chargers

RIOD manufactures three families of AC EV chargers, all designed and assembled in India:

#### Powerpod Lite (Home / Light Commercial)
- **3.3 kW** — Single-phase, RFID, plug-and-play wall charger
- **7.4 kW** — Single-phase, RFID, Type 2 connector
- **22 kW / 11 kW** — Three-phase, RFID, fast AC charger
- Features: RFID authentication, plug-and-play operation, built-in protections (overcurrent, overvoltage, earth leakage, surge, short circuit)
- Use case: Homes, small offices, overnight charging

#### Powerpod Go (Commercial / Semi-Public)
- **3.3 kW** — OCPP 1.6J, RFID, 4G, WiFi
- **7.4 kW** — OCPP 1.6J, RFID, 4G, WiFi
- **22 kW / 11 kW** — OCPP 1.6J, RFID, 4G, WiFi
- Features: Full OCPP 1.6J compliance, remote management, 4G cellular + WiFi connectivity, RFID authentication
- Use case: Offices, hotels, fleet depots, commercial parking

#### Powerpod City (Public / High-Throughput)
- **3.3 kW** — Dual-gun, OCPP 1.6J, RFID, 4G
- **7.4 kW** — Dual-gun, OCPP 1.6J, RFID, 4G
- **22 kW / 11 kW** — Dual-gun, OCPP 1.6J, RFID, 4G
- Features: Dual-gun for simultaneous charging, public-grade enclosure, OCPP 1.6J, RFID + app authentication
- Use case: Malls, public parking, highways, municipal charging stations

### DC Fast Chargers
- **30 kW, 60 kW, 120 kW** — Available for enquiry
- CCS2 connector, high-power DC charging for commercial and public deployments

### Energy Products

#### Power Master
- Centralized energy management and load balancing platform
- Real-time monitoring of energy consumption across sites
- Solar integration, demand response, peak shaving

#### Energy Management
- Multi-point energy monitoring for buildings, campuses, and hotel chains
- Equipment-level consumption tracking
- Anomaly detection and consumption forecasting

#### Infrastructure Monitoring
- Remote monitoring of charging infrastructure health
- Predictive maintenance alerts
- Uptime optimization for charge point operators

## Technology

RIOD builds 14 proprietary technology layers for EV charging:

1. **OCPP Implementation** — Full OCPP 1.6J protocol stack for charger-to-CMS communication
2. **Charger Management Suite (CMS)** — Cloud platform for managing charger networks
3. **Decentralized Load Balancing** — Dynamic power distribution across multiple chargers without central controller
4. **Self-Resettable RCD** — Automatic fault recovery for unmanned charging sites
5. **Payment & Billing Terminals** — Integrated payment processing for public charging
6. **Fleet Management** — EV fleet charging optimization and scheduling
7. **EVSE Hardware Core** — In-house PCB design, power electronics, and enclosure engineering
8. **Community & Residential Charging** — Multi-tenant charging management for apartments and gated communities
9. **Intelligent Vehicle Queuing** — Queue management for high-demand charging locations
10. **Charger Intelligence** — Edge computing on chargers for real-time decision making
11. **Smart Parking Integration** — EV charging integrated with parking management systems
12. **EVSE Operations Suite** — End-to-end operations platform (Observe, Operate, Operate Plus tiers)
13. **Battery Intelligence** — Battery health monitoring and optimized charging profiles
14. **Predictive Analytics** — AI-driven demand forecasting and infrastructure planning

## Applications

RIOD deploys EV charging across these verticals:
- Hotels & Resorts
- Offices & Workplaces
- Malls & Theatres
- Hospitals & Healthcare
- Parking Complexes
- Residential Apartments & Gated Communities
- Educational Institutions
- Highway Charging Stations

## Differentiators

- **Full-stack OEM**: Hardware, firmware, cloud software, and energy systems built in-house — not assembled from third-party modules
- **Made in India**: Designed and manufactured at Infopark Koratty, Kerala
- **Protocol native**: OCPP 1.6J implemented from scratch, not adapted from libraries
- **Decentralized architecture**: Load balancing works without central controller — each charger communicates peer-to-peer
- **Self-resettable protection**: RCDs auto-recover from faults without manual intervention — critical for unmanned sites
- **CMS-agnostic**: Chargers integrate with any OCPP-compliant CMS (TelioEV, ElectricPe, Numocity, KazamEV, Wavefuel, EVCFinder, Tata Power, PlugEasy)

## Compliance & Standards

- OCPP 1.6J certified
- IEC 61851 compliant
- IS 17017 (Indian Standard for EV charging)
- IP54 / IP65 enclosures (model dependent)
- Type 2 (IEC 62196) connectors for AC
- CCS2 connectors for DC
